headline: Crinetics (CRNX) Stock Could Be Overvalued After Its 113% Run
summary: Crinetics Pharmaceuticals stock has delivered a strong 112.8% return over the past three years, yet its valuation checks paint a mixed picture at the same time as investors weigh the agreed US$85 per share cash acquisition by Vertex Pharmaceuticals against the current market pricing. Over the last three years, Crinetics Pharmaceuticals has returned 112.8%, which puts recent gains in the context of a longer period of substantial shareholder returns. Vertex's planned US$10b cash acquisition,...

headline: This Biotech Stock Is Soaring 99% After Vertex Agrees to Takeover Deal
summary: Crinetics Pharmaceuticals  stock was surging on Tuesday after  Vertex Pharmaceuticals  said it had agreed to buy the biotech for $10 billion.  Vertex slid 1.2%.  Vertex said in a press release late Monday that it would buy Crinetics, which specializes in discovering and developing treatments for endocrine diseases, for $85 a share in cash.

headline: Vertex Sees Over $5 Billion Peak Sales Potential From Crinetics Assets
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated (NASDAQ:VRTX) on Monday agreed to acquire Crinetics Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ:CRNX) for $85 per share in cash, a total equity value of approximately $10 billion ($8.8 billion net of cash). Vertex expects to finance the acquisition using a combination of cash on hand and debt, supported by $4.5 billion of fully committed bridge financing. Vertex’s cash, cash equivalents, and total marketable securities as of March 31, 2026, were $13.0 billion. Read Also: Ver

(NASDAQ:CRNX) for $85 per share in cash, a total equity value of approximately $10 billion ($8.8 billion net of cash). Vertex expects to finance the acquisition using a combination of cash on hand and debt, supported by $4.5 billion of fully committed bridge financing.
